description:
Dorion is an alternative Discord client aimed towards lower-spec or storage-sensitive PCs that supports themes, plugins, and more!


Changes
- Move some functionality to a Shelter plugin
- Ctrl + F now focuses the Discord search box properly
- RPC menu no longer shows up on macOS (which can't support RPC due to a OS limitation)
- Fix some instances of the wrong amount of notifications being displayed on the app badge
- Other misc. fixes, probably
